category_sources: Official site https://bunster.netlify.app/ describes Bunster as a shell compiler for self-contained executable programs.
source_facts.description says it compiles shell scripts to static binaries.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title at https://bunster.netlify.app/ is Bunster.
docs_sources: Official site navigation links to Documentation and the documentation page at https://bunster.netlify.app/introduction.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/yassinebenaid/bunster, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://bunster.netlify.app/ describes shell compilation, static binaries, bash compatibility, modules, package manager, env files, asset embedding, and flags parsing.
